name: agent-bridge
description: Bidirectional agent bridge as an MCP server (antigravity_agent / claude_agent / codex_agent), plus skills for delegating to Antigravity and running cross-model code reviews.

interface.shortDescription: Spawn Antigravity/Claude/Codex sub-agents; run cross-model reviews
interface.longDescription: Exposes antigravity_agent, claude_agent, and codex_agent as MCP tools so any host agent can spawn a sub-agent in another model family, and ships skills for delegating work to Antigravity (Gemini) and for running multi-model (cross-family) code reviews of a diff. Installing this plugin registers both the bundled MCP server and the skills.
defaultPrompt: Run a cross-model review of my current diff.
Delegate this task to an Antigravity sub-agent.
